purpose: Block `ndd story implement` implementation proposal/projection unless Gemini evidence, promoted authority, red evidence, and proof-surface posture exist.
passConditions: story implement command is classified as cognitive_compile
Gemini invocation receipt exists and passed
story-plan authority promotion receipt exists and passed
red receipt exists before implementation projection
implementation proposal is candidate/proof surface only
green receipt cannot exist without matching prior red receipt
generated implementation cannot become durable truth
completionPosture: Story implement may only create generated proof-surface implementation after Gemini-backed authority, test intent, red receipt, and promotion posture gates pass.
